scriptLines: Model = case({Business model}=="Open Access","Fully OA",trim({Business model})),
Model = iif({Publishing Model} == 'Fully Open Access','Fully OA',
{Not in any Standard Collections} as string,
{Year of First Backfile Volume} as short,
{Year of Last Backfile Volume} as short,
{Digital ISSN} == JoiningID || left(toString({Hybrid Open Access }),1)=='Y' || isNull({FTE Price Model}),
Imprint = iif(left({Journal Owned by},5)=='Wiley' || left({Journal Owned by},6)=='Blackw',{Journal Owned by},''),
{Journal Owned by} == 'Blackwell' || {Journal Owned by} =='John Wiley & Sons Australia, Ltd' ||
{Journal Owned by} == 'John Wiley & Sons Ltd' ||{Journal Owned by} =='John Wiley & Sons'),

/* Tried the above with in clause. but didnt work for ('Wiley', 'Wiley-VCH', 'Wiley VCH', 'Blackwell','John Wiley & Sons Australia, Ltd', 'John Wiley & Sons Ltd', 'John Wiley & Sons') */) ~> derivedColumn1
iif({Renewal Subscription Type} == "Free to read", {Renewal Subscription Type}, ""),
iif({Renewal Subscription Type} == "Free to read" && (Model == "Hybrid" && left(toString({Hybrid Open Access }),1) == "Y"), "; ", ""),
iif(Model == "Hybrid" && left(toString({Hybrid Open Access }),1) == "Y", toString({Hybrid Open Access }), "")
/* validate the above for ; used for concatenation...check how it works by ingnoring null while concatenating  */) ~> derivedColumn3
/* Formula used in excel is =IF(OR(NOT(ISNA([@[OpenAccess]])),ISNA([@[Hybrid]])),"Fully OA","Hybrid")
Valid entry in OA OR Not in Hybrid then Fully OA, else Hybrid */,
concat("Not in OA Price List - ", {Renewal Subscription Type}),
/* consider only 512 characters in the resultant string */) ~> derivedColumn5
{Not in any Standard Collections} as string,
{Year of First Backfile Volume} as short,
{Year of Last Backfile Volume} as short,
{Digital ISSN} == JoiningID || left(toString({Hybrid Open Access }),1)=='Y' || isNull({FTE Price Model}),
Imprint = iif(left({Journal Owned by},5)=='Wiley' || left({Journal Owned by},6)=='Blackw',{Journal Owned by},''),
{Journal Owned by} == 'Blackwell' || {Journal Owned by} =='John Wiley & Sons Australia, Ltd' ||
{Journal Owned by} == 'John Wiley & Sons Ltd' ||{Journal Owned by} =='John Wiley & Sons'),

/* Tried the above with in clause. but didnt work for ('Wiley', 'Wiley-VCH', 'Wiley VCH', 'Blackwell','John Wiley & Sons Australia, Ltd', 'John Wiley & Sons Ltd', 'John Wiley & Sons') */) ~> derivedColumn1
iif({Renewal Subscription Type} == "Free to read", {Renewal Subscription Type}, ""),
iif({Renewal Subscription Type} == "Free to read" && (Model == "Hybrid" && left(toString({Hybrid Open Access }),1) == "Y"), "; ", ""),
iif(Model == "Hybrid" && left(toString({Hybrid Open Access }),1) == "Y", toString({Hybrid Open Access }), "")
/* validate the above for ; used for concatenation...check how it works by ingnoring null while concatenating  */) ~> derivedColumn3
Formula used in excel is =IF(OR(NOT(ISNA([@[OpenAccess]])),ISNA([@[Hybrid]])),"Fully OA","Hybrid")
Valid entry in OA OR Not in Hybrid then Fully OA, else Hybrid */,
concat("Not in OA Price List - ", {Renewal Subscription Type}),
/* consider only 512 characters in the resultant string */) ~> derivedColumn5

transformations.name: unionAllAndExclusivelyInHybOA
transformations.description: Combining rows from All Journals(inclusive of Hyb & OA journals) and Journals that is available only in Hyb & OA but not in ALL

scriptLines: /* =IFERROR(INDEX(List2[Model],[@[Idx List 2]]),"None")....if the journal is found in list2 tider, then take the model as it is else none */,
apc_FOA_v := iif({Original Research} == 'N/A',{Case Reports/Study Protocols},{Original Research})) ~> derivedColumn3
{Model Notes} = iif(isNull({APC (CCBY)}), "CC BY-NC-ND only","")  /* =IF([@[APC (CCBY)]]="N/A","CC BY-NC-ND only","")*/,
/* Discrepancies observed in few Titles between Hyb & OA journals names and Kbart Titles. Hence hardcoding using to Find and Replace csv file */) ~> ChangingTitleThatGotChanged

lookup2 derive({Journal title} = iif(not(isNull(Find)),trim(Replace),    iif(({Journal title} == 'SHOCK%'),'Shock',trim({Journal title}))    )/* Discrepancies observed in few Titles between Hyb & OA journals names and Kbart Titles. Hence hardcoding using to Find and Replace csv file */) ~> derivedColumn1

lookup3 derive({Journal Name} = iif(not(isNull(Find)),trim(Replace),    iif(({Journal Name} == 'SHOCK%'),'Shock',trim({Journal Name}))    )/* Discrepancies observed in few Titles between Hyb & OA journals names and Kbart Titles. Hence hardcoding using to Find and Replace csv file */) ~> derivedColumn2

lookup4 derive(publication_title = iif(not(isNull(Find)),trim(Replace),    iif(({publication_title} == 'SHOCK%'),'Shock',trim({publication_title}))    )/* Discrepancies observed in few Titles between Hyb & OA journals names and Kbart Titles. Hence hardcoding using to Find and Replace csv file */) ~> derivedColumn5

derivedColumn2 derive({Journal Name} = lower(  regexReplace(    regexReplace(      regexReplace(        regexReplace({Journal Name}, '&', 'and'),        '[^a-zA-Z0-9]', ' '      ),      '\\s+', ' '    ),    '®', ''  ))) ~> derivedColumn6

transformations.name: unionAllAndExclusivelyInHybOA
transformations.description: Combining rows from All Journals(inclusive of Hyb & OA journals) and Journals that is available only in Hyb & OA but not in ALL

scriptLines: /* =IFERROR(INDEX(List2[Model],[@[Idx List 2]]),"None")....if the journal is found in list2 tider, then take the model as it is else none */,
apc_FOA_v := iif({Original Research} == 'N/A',{Case Reports/Study Protocols},{Original Research})) ~> derivedColumn3
{Model Notes} = iif(isNull({APC (CCBY)}), "CC BY-NC-ND only","")  /* =IF([@[APC (CCBY)]]="N/A","CC BY-NC-ND only","")*/,
/* Discrepancies observed in few Titles between Hyb & OA journals names and Kbart Titles. Hence hardcoding using to Find and Replace csv file */) ~> ChangingTitleThatGotChanged
{Access Method for non-OA Content} as string,
{First Year Available with a Front-File Subscription**} as string,
{Included in All Publications Package} as string,
{Included in ACS Core Plus Package} as string,
{Optional in Science Essentials Package} as string
Source = "Publisher Website via Misc Publisher APCs list",
model_v := iif({Type of open access} == 'Fully open', 'Fully OA', iif({Type of open access} == 'Hybrid', 'Hybrid', iif({Type of open access} == 'Conf series', 'Fully OA', 'None'))),
{Access Method for non-OA Content} as string,
{First Year Available with a Front-File Subscription**} as string,
{Included in All Publications Package} as string,
{Included in ACS Core Plus Package} as string,
{Optional in Science Essentials Package} as string
/* APC is 4500 for all Hybrid Journals;
for all open access journals except 'ACS Omega' and 'ACS Central Science' 3500 */,
Model_v := case({Access Method for non-OA Content}=="Open Access Only","Fully OA",'Hybrid'),
/* to eliminate content within paranthesis. ex-replace "ACS ES&T Air (New in 2024)" as "ACS ES&T Air" */) ~> PreparingList1
{Access Method for non-OA Content} as string,
{First Year Available with a Front-File Subscription**} as string,
{Included in All Publications Package} as string,
{Included in ACS Core Plus Package} as string,
{Optional in Science Essentials Package} as string
/* APC is 4500 for all Hybrid Journals;
for all open access journals except 'ACS Omega' and 'ACS Central Science' 3500 */,
Model_v := case({Access Method for non-OA Content}=="Open Access Only","Fully OA",'Hybrid'),
/* to eliminate content within paranthesis. ex-replace "ACS ES&T Air (New in 2024)" as "ACS ES&T Air" */) ~> derivedColumn1
/* if the journal is found in platinum(OA) then model is "Fully OA" otherwise "Hybrid" */,
/* if the journal is found in platinum(OA) then model is "Fully OA" and model notes as "Platinum journal" */,
/* APC is 3874 for all List1 Journals (Platinum and KBART);
for all other journals refer Hybrid sheet. For latest "Article processing charges" refer https://www.emeraldgrouppublishing.com/publish-with-us/publish-open-access/journal#apc-charges*/,
sourceAllJournal, sourceOATitle lookup(sourceAllJournal@{Journal Code} == sourceOATitle@{Journal Code},
sourceGoldOATitle, sourceGoldOAPriceList lookup(sourceGoldOATitle@{Journal Code} == sourceGoldOAPriceList@{Journal Code},
Source = "Publisher Website via Misc Publisher APCs list",
/* Pl. validate the default hybrid APC 3600 with Delta Think team before executing this flow */,
iif(OnlineCode == '2689-288X','National Neurotrauma Society, European Neurotrauma Organization',
Title = replace(trim(publication_title),', including the Proceedings of the Wireless Section of the Institution',''),

/* =IF(OR([@[publisher_name]]="OUP",[@[publisher_name]]="MIT Press",[@[publisher_name]]="OSA"),"DELETE - covered by "&[@[publisher_name]],IF([@Title]="Engineering & Technology", "DELETE - trade magazine","")) */,
publication_title =='Journal of Optical Communications and Networking','OSA',
Title = replace(trim({Publication Title}),', including the Proceedings of the Wireless Section of the Institution',''),
Model = case({Open Access Type} == 'Full Open Access','Fully OA',
hybrid_open_access_journals as (title as string, title_url as string, Online_ISSN as string, Print_ISSN as string)[]
gold_open_access_journals as (APC as short, Online_ISSN as string, Print_ISSN as string, title as string, title_url as string)[]
diamond_open_access_journals as (title as string, title_url as string, Online_ISSN as string, Print_ISSN as string)[]
Source = "Publisher Website via Misc Publisher APCs list",
journals as (title as string, title_url as string, ISSN as string, eISSN as string, CODEN as string, open_access as boolean)[]
Source = "Publisher Website via Misc Publisher APCs list",
Society = iif(flatten1@title == 'Chinese Optics Letters', 'Chinese Laser Press',
iif(flatten1@title == 'Current Optics and Photonics','Optical Society of Korea',
iif(flatten1@title == 'Journal of Optical Communications and Networking','IEEE',
iif(flatten1@title == 'Journal of Optical Technology','Vavilov State Optical Institute',
iif(flatten1@title == 'Photonics Research','Chinese Laser Press','Optical Society of America '
join1 derive(Model = iif({Journal Type}=='Full Open Access', 'Fully OA', iif({Journal Type}=='Hybrid', 'Hybrid', '')),
